reasoning: VIX at 24.04 remains in HIGH regime despite falling -11.65% overnight (compression signal). However, macro backdrop contradicts the VIX fall: risk-off rotation (XLK -1.19%, XLF -0.45%, SPY -1.04% yesterday), and overnight gap-up +$2.01 conflicts with persistent sector weakness. No events today block trades, but FOMC decision meeting 2026-03-18 (52 hours away) creates low-level caution. VIX compression alone would be bullish, but the risk_off rotation + elevated IV regime + yesterday's selloff creates a bearish tilt. Expect directional volatility and possible rotational chop.
